ddls:
CREATE TABLE "model_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the log entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the model being logged */,
  "r_t1" REAL /* Reward type 1 value */,
  "r_t2" REAL /* Reward type 2 value */,
  "c_prob" INTEGER /* Cumulative probability of actions taken */,
  "c_prob_epoch_t0" INTEGER /* Cumulative probability at epoch t0 */,
  "c_prob_epoch_t1" INTEGER /* Cumulative probability at epoch t1 */,
  "cp" INTEGER /* Current policy value */,
  "obs_cp" INTEGER /* Observed cumulative probability */,
  "epoch" INTEGER /* Training epoch number */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the model was trained */,
  "episode" INTEGER /* Episode number within the training process */,
  "action_distribution" TEXT /* Probability distribution of actions taken */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model during the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model being evaluated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model's architecture or purpose */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the model */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Default environment for the model */,
  "training_status" TEXT /* Current training status of the model */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last modification date of the model */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user who created the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reward_statistics" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the reward entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Model identifier associated with the rewards */,
  "mu_rewards" REAL /* Mean of rewards obtained */,
  "std_rewards" REAL /* Standard deviation of rewards */,
  "epoch" INTEGER /* Epoch number during training */,
  "episode" INTEGER /* Episode number within the training process */,
  "min_rewards" REAL /* Minimum reward obtained */,
  "max_rewards" REAL /* Maximum reward obtained */,
  "total_rewards" REAL /* Total reward obtained during the epoch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reward_statistics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the hyperparameter entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Model identifier associated with the hyperparameters */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "param_value" REAL /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "epoch" INTEGER /* Training epoch number */,
  "episode" INTEGER /* Episode number within the training process */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model during the hyperparameter log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, researcher) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user accessing the model */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the model accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was accessed */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Information about the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
